title: SINTRA Stability Analytics
summary: 4-layer real-time analytics on UWB indoor tracking
description:
A 4-layer real-time analytics stack on top of a UWB + camera indoor tracking platform for a European industrial IoT client. Turns millions of raw x/y/z coordinates into per-asset stability scores, device health classes, zone quality tiers, and alerts — before operators notice problems.

Layer A — Source: x/y/z positions from InfluxDB or REST (swappable via config).
Layer B — ETL: jitter calculation, scoring, classification, Tile38 zone enrichment, incremental processing with state tracking.
Layer C — Visualization: 3 Grafana dashboards, 21 panels, 5 interactive filters.
Layer D — Alerting: 6 alert rules with WARNING / CRITICAL severity.

Results: 16 assets tracked across a 9-hour trade-fair session with 12,732 one-minute windows processed. Median stability 82.7 / 100; 90% classified GREEN.
